_comment: Cold-viewer-first, value-led narration. Conversational + TTS-friendly. Cloned from reference.wav. Scene order: hook → what you get → getting started → the magic → example → you decide → every shop → close.

sections.text: If you run a bakery, every morning is the same gamble. How much do I bake? Make too much, you bin it. Too little, you turn customers away.
BakerySense just tells you. Open it, and you see exactly how much to bake today. Ninety croissants, not a hundred and twenty. With the waste and sell-out risk already worked out.
Setup is simple. Connect your sales, a spreadsheet, or your point of sale, and it learns your shop.
But here's what's special. It keeps getting smarter on its own. Every night, it checks its own guesses against what actually sold.
Say it kept suggesting too many croissants every Wednesday. It spots the pattern, and proposes a fix, already tested on your real sales.
You just tap approve. Tomorrow's plan is better, and you're always in control.
Every shop is different, so each one learns its own habits. One learns Wednesdays, another learns Sundays.
That's BakerySense. It doesn't just predict. It learns your bakery, and gets better every day.
